title: app.config Facet
description: Demanded by the web-server onboarding Baseline (ADR-0055/0083): the OBSERVED application configuration of a host, projected by the remediation Run's fact-back (ADR-0084 generic stratt_facets convention) with Run provenance (§1.2) under the Step's FacetWriteScope (ADR-0054). port is the effective listen port the configure Run read back from the target after converging it — the observed value the Baseline's app.config.port expectation is checked against (drift while it differs from the Intent's resolved port, resolved once they agree). The schema is CLOSED (§9): the onboarding Baseline reads exactly port, so the seam carries exactly port — not an application-config ontology.
